## Memory Safety Fixes Applied
- EventLoopCoordinator.ResetInstance() called between every test
- Per-test memory watchdog (500MB growth limit per test, checked every 500ms)
- Interpreter CancellationToken support for aborting runaway tests
- Aggressive GC when managed heap exceeds 500MB
- Pre-test memory threshold check (1.5GB)
